programmes.show_name: Best of the Bloomberg Women Money & Power Event
programmes.show_description: Highlights of the event which brings together the most influential female voices in finance from around the world to discuss the biggest themes facing the future of business.
Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons.
